creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I solved the problem: if I disable buildind with EXAMPLES it is everything okay.
Default is:
ncurses-6.2.20210213_1: DEBUG=off: Build with debugging support
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     EXAMPLES=on: Build and/or install examples
     MANPAGES=on: Build and/or install manual pages
     PROFILE=off: Build with profiling support
     TRACE=off: Add trace() function to all models of ncurses
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings  

and I changed settings to  "EXAMPLES=off: Build and/or install examples" and it works.
If you want log anywhee I can build again with examples on but in the evening or tomorrow,

Thank you very much.
